title: Update Edhoc*::new to accept &mut impl RngCore + CryptoRng
description: Change constructors to take RNG param for no_std compatibility. Update docs, add precise imports. Update all test calls. Best option from (require std, accept RNG, pre-gen keys).
close_reason: Fixed RNG usage with idiomatic no_std RngCore + CryptoRng param. Tests pass, clippy/fmt clean. Updated Cargo.toml for features and dev-deps. No other crates affected yet.
